definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Additionally, we need to buy milk.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Additionally, we need to buy milk.
definitions.usage_context_en: As an extra factor or reason; in addition.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: As an extra factor or reason; in addition.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The sisters dress similarly.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In a similar way.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Study hard, otherwise you will fail.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Study hard, otherwise you will fail.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to state the consequence if a condition is not met.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to state the consequence if a condition is not met.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is quiet, but she is otherwise.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He is quiet, but she is otherwise.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In a different way; differently.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It was cold. Nevertheless, he went swimming.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: It was cold. Nevertheless, he went swimming.
definitions.usage_context_en: In spite of that; nonetheless (a very formal version of 'however').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In spite of that; nonetheless (a very formal version of 'however').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The results are bad. Nonetheless, we must continue.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The results are bad. Nonetheless, we must continue.
definitions.usage_context_en: In spite of that; nevertheless (also very formal).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In spite of that; nevertheless (also very formal).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is sick; therefore, he will not come.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He is sick; therefore, he will not come.
definitions.usage_context_en: For that reason; consequently (used in formal speech or writing).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: For that reason; consequently (used in formal speech or writing).]
